title: Paint It Gold
overview: Arthur, a passionate Parisian art gallery owner, represents Renzo, a longtime friend, and radical figurative painter stuck in an existential crisis. Suffering from painter's block, dejected, Renzo slumps into utter boredom. To save themselves, Arthur develops a bold plan to bring them both back into the limelight.

trailers.title: UN COUP DE MAÎTRE Bande Annonce (2023) Vincent Macaigne, Bouli Lanners, Comédie Française
